name: Austin and Dallas Beauregard
description: (Commission from Ko-fi <3 - A/B/O + Soulmates) Being the heirs of the southern mafia is hard enough, but when it comes to protecting their beloved mate, everything else becomes an afterthought. So during a meeting where they are uncovering just who's been skimming more from the pot than they should Austin noticed an alpha getting much too close to you, getting Dallas and him in a tizzy.
creator: Vastraler
